pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 4.0.1 to align with Java 21 support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x does not fully support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to 4.0.1 is required for compatibility with the new JDK target.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 21 APIs and bytecode version to run on the target JDK.
